title: Crunchy Uruguayan Lamb Skewers
description: A traditional Uruguayan dish featuring lamb stock, sous-vide cooking, and a crunchy fermented crust, perfect for a energizing dinner. This recipe combines the tender flavor of lamb with the crunch of fermented ingredients.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together lamb stock, fermented chimichurri, olive oil, garlic, parsley, red pepper flakes, salt, black pepper, and paprika.
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and marinate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Thread the marinated lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers in the sous-vide machine and cook for 2 hours.
Remove the skewers from the sous-vide machine and place them on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake the skewers in the oven for 10-12 minutes, or until they develop a crunchy crust.
Remove the skewers from the oven and let them rest for 5 minutes before serving.
